description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden coatrack with a classic, ornate design. The central pole is turned with decorative grooves and bulges, giving it a traditional appearance. Multiple hooks extend outward at two different heights, providing ample space for hanging coats, hats, or scarves. The base consists of three sturdy legs, each capped with a rounded finial, ensuring stability. The wood has a rich, dark brown finish, and the hooks are integrated into the main structure. There are no visible umbrella holders or additional storage features at the base.
description: A tall, ornate wooden coatrack with multiple hooks and a stable, three-legged base. The design features decorative turning and a rich brown finish.
description_view_0: The coatrack is seen at an angle, highlighting the turned central pole, three legs, and several hooks extending outward.
description_view_1: A direct front view shows the symmetrical arrangement of hooks and the full height of the central pole.
description_view_2: This angled view emphasizes the depth of the hooks and the spacing between the legs.
description_view_3: A rear-angled view reveals the back hooks and the alignment of the legs, with decorative finials visible.
